name: The company follows a quality management process for handling non-conformities a
description: The company follows a quality management process for handling non-conformities and releasing batches. The process involves registering NCRs, classifying them by severity, and taking appropriate actions.
kpis: Number of critical NCRs per month
Number of major NCRs per month
Number of minor NCRs per month
Time to complete root cause investigations
business_rules: and escalate to General Management if not closed within 120 days

procedure_steps.name: NCR Registration
procedure_steps.rule: Classify NCR by severity (critical, major, minor)

procedure_steps.name: Automatic Batch Blocking
procedure_steps.rule: Block batch automatically if NCR is critical

procedure_steps.name: Notification to Director of Quality
procedure_steps.rule: Notify Director of Quality within 4 hours if NCR is critical

procedure_steps.name: Root Cause Investigation
procedure_steps.rule: Open root cause investigation for major NCRs, to be completed within 10 working days using 8D methodology

procedure_steps.name: Batch Release
procedure_steps.rule: Verify certificates of raw materials from approved suppliers (CeramTech GmbH, BioMat Iberia, Nippon Advanced Ceramics) before authorizing production

procedure_steps.name: CAPA Tracking
procedure_steps.rule: Verify effectiveness of CAPA within 90 days, and escalate to General Management if not closed within 120 days

builder_prompt:
You are the Agentic Zero Builder Agent. Generate a complete, production-ready Python autonomous agent.

PROCESS: The company follows a quality management process for handling non-conformities and releasing batches. The process involves registering NCRs, classifying them by severity, and taking appropriate actions.
CLASS NAME: QualityManagementNonConformanceHandlingQmsNcrAndProductionBatchReleaseOracleWmsAgent
PROCESS ID: CUSTOMER-QUALITY-MANAGEMENT-N
COMPANY: Bioceramicas del Mediterraneo SA | SECTOR: medtech_manufacturing | ERP: Oracle Fusion Cloud SCM
VOLUME: 180
OPERATING HOURS: 
CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD: 0.8

PROCESS STEPS (implement each as an async method):
  STEP-01: NCR Registration
    System: Oracle Quality Management
    Rule: Classify NCR by severity (critical, major, minor)
    SAP tx: []
    External APIs: []
    Escalation: none -> 
  STEP-02: Automatic Batch Blocking
    System: Oracle WMS
    Rule: Block batch automatically if NCR is critical
    SAP tx: []
    External APIs: []
    Escalation: none -> 
  STEP-03: Notification to Director of Quality
    System: Oracle Quality Management
    Rule: Notify Director of Quality within 4 hours if NCR is critical
    SAP tx: []
    External APIs: []
    Escalation: none -> 
  STEP-04: Root Cause Investigation
    System: Oracle Quality Management
    Rule: Open root cause investigation for major NCRs, to be completed within 10 working days using 8D methodology
    SAP tx: []
    External APIs: []
    Escalation: none -> 
  STEP-05: Batch Release
    System: Oracle WMS
    Rule: Verify certificates of raw materials from approved suppliers (CeramTech GmbH, BioMat Iberia, Nippon Advanced Ceramics) before authorizing production
    SAP tx: []
    External APIs: []
    Escalation: none -> 
  STEP-06: CAPA Tracking
    System: Oracle Quality Management
    Rule: Verify effectiveness of CAPA within 90 days, and escalate to General Management if not closed within 120 days
    SAP tx: []
    External APIs: []
    Escalation: approval -> 

EXTERNAL CONNECTORS (implement each as a class with connect() and dry-run mock):


ESCALATION SCENARIOS (implement handle_escalation() with all cases):
  approval: queue_and_await_approval -> env:ESCALATION_OPS

AUTONOMOUS ACTIONS (agent executes without human approval):
  - Read data
  - Validate data
  - Create draft recommendation

APPROVAL REQUIRED (agent pauses and awaits human decision):


ALWAYS HUMAN (agent never executes these autonomously):


AGENTIC SHIELD REQUIREMENTS (embed in every decision):
  - Identity & Access
  - Real-time Audit Trails
  - Escalation Pathways
  - Human Accountability
  - Action Thresholds
  - Fail-Safes

COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORKS (embed compliance checks):


KPIs TO TRACK (log in audit trail and dashboard events):
  - Number of NCRs per month
  - Number of critical NCRs per month
  - Number of major NCRs per month
  - Number of minor NCRs per month
  - Time to resolve NCRs
  - Time to complete root cause investigations
  - Time to verify CAPA effectiveness

LEARNING HOOKS FOR THE MACHINE (emit these events):
{
  "enabled": true,
  "observation_points": [
    "step execution time",
    "exception frequency",
    "human escalation frequency",
    "manual override frequency",
    "KPI deviation from target"
  ],
  "failure_patterns": [
    "NCR not classified by severity",
    "Batch not blocked automatically for critical NCR",
    "Director of Quality not notified within 4 hours for critical NCR",
    "Root cause investigation not completed within 10 working days for major NCR",
    "Certificates of raw materials not verified before authorizing production",
    "CAPA not verified within 90 days or not closed within 120 days"
  ],
  "kpi_deviation_signals": [
    "Number of NCRs per month",
    "Number of critical NCRs per month",
    "Number of major NCRs per month",
    "Number of minor NCRs per month",
    "Time to resolve NCRs",
    "Time to complete root cause investigations",
    "Time to verify CAPA effectiveness"
  ],
  "feedback_targets": [
    "business_rules",
    "exceptions",
    "autonomy_design",
    "acceptance_criteria",
    "agent_blueprint"
  ],
  "improvement_loop": "observe_analyze_recommend_validate_deploy"
}

ACCEPTANCE TEST SCENARIOS (all must pass before Guardian certification):
  - Happy path test for Quality Management: Non-Conformance Handling [QMS-NCR] and Production: Batch Release [ORACLE-WMS]
  - Missing data exception test
  - System unavailable exception test
  - Human approval escalation test
  - Audit trail verification test

MISSING INFORMATION (handle gracefully with dry-run mock until resolved):
  - NCR classification criteria: Not explicitly stated in the text
  - Root cause investigation methodology: Not explicitly stated in the text

MANDATORY CODE REQUIREMENTS:
1. All process steps as async methods: step_01_order_received(), step_02_validate_order(), etc.
2. SAPConnector class with connect(), all required RFC/BAPI calls, and _mock_* dry-run methods
3. External API connectors (TMS, email) with connect() and _mock_* dry-run methods
4. handle_escalation(order, reason) covering ALL escalation scenarios above
5. EmailDraftGenerator for capacity notifications using xAI grok-3-mini
6. AuditEntry dataclass -- log every decision with timestamp, rule, confidence, outcome
7. Dashboard events JSONL stream for Autonomy Dashboard
8. CLI: --mode live/dry-run/single --order ORDER_ID
9. EU AI Act ART.12 audit trail -- ART.14 human oversight checkpoints
10. ASCII-only source code (Windows PowerShell compatible)
11. Dry-run mode must work with zero external dependencies
12. Config via environment variables (.env file)
13. Operating hours check: queue orders outside 

The agent must make it feel like a living enterprise. Every order processed updates the Enterprise Pulse.
Generate complete, runnable Python code. No placeholders. No TODO comments. Production-ready.
